title: PortfolioKPIExtraction
description: Fields the LLM extracts from a board deck or LP update. No doc_id — that is injected by the extractor.

reporting_period.description: Quarter and year of the report, e.g. 'Q3 2024'.

doc_type.description: Document type inferred from content: 'board_update' or 'deal_memo'.

arr_usd.description: Annual Recurring Revenue in USD as a plain number, e.g. 2400000 for $2.4M.

mrr_usd.description: Monthly Recurring Revenue in USD as a plain number.

arr_growth_yoy_pct.description: ARR year-over-year growth percentage, e.g. 85.0 for 85%.

burn_rate_monthly_usd.description: Net monthly cash burn in USD as a plain number.

runway_months.description: Cash runway in months as of the reporting date.

headcount.description: Total full-time employee count as an integer.

customer_count.description: Total paying customer count as an integer.

ndr_pct.description: Net Dollar Retention percentage, e.g. 118.0 for 118%.

key_milestones.description: Key milestones achieved this period. Use [] if none mentioned.

notable_risks.description: Risks or concerns raised. Use [] if none mentioned.
